tEn: Point-E: A System for Generating 3D Point Clouds from Complex Prompts
tZh: Point-E: 一种从复杂提示生成3D点云的系统
sEn: Point-E generates 3D point clouds from text prompts in 1-2 minutes on a single GPU, offering a practical speed-quality trade-off.
sZh: Point-E 能在单个GPU上1-2分钟内从文本提示生成3D点云，提供了速度与质量之间的实用权衡。
absEn: While recent work on text-conditional 3D object generation has shown promising results, the state-of-the-art methods typically require multiple GPU-hours to produce a single sample. This is in stark contrast to state-of-the-art generative image models, which produce samples in a number of seconds or minutes. In this paper, we explore an alternative method for 3D object generation which produces 3D models in only 1-2 minutes on a single GPU. Our method first generates a single synthetic view using a text-to-image diffusion model, and then produces a 3D point cloud using a second diffusion model which conditions on the generated image. While our method still falls short of the state-of-the-art in terms of sample quality, it is one to two orders of magnitude faster to sample from, offering a practical trade-off for some use cases. We release our pre-trained point cloud diffusion models, as well as evaluation code and models, at https://github.com/openai/point-e.
absZh: 尽管近期关于文本条件3D物体生成的工作取得了有希望的结果，但最先进的方法通常需要多个GPU小时才能生成单个样本。这与最先进的生成式图像模型形成鲜明对比，后者在几秒或几分钟内就能生成样本。在本文中，我们探索了一种替代的3D物体生成方法，该方法在单个GPU上仅需1-2分钟即可生成3D模型。我们的方法首先使用文本到图像扩散模型生成单个合成视图，然后使用第二个扩散模型基于生成的图像生成3D点云。尽管我们的方法在样本质量上仍不及最先进水平，但其采样速度快一到两个数量级，为某些用例提供了实用的权衡。我们在https://github.com/openai/point-e 发布了预训练的点云扩散模型以及评估代码和模型。

contrib.en: Proposes a two-stage diffusion pipeline for text-to-3D generation, reducing sampling time to 1-2 minutes on a single GPU.
contrib.zh: 提出两阶段扩散流水线用于文本到3D生成，将采样时间缩短至单GPU 1-2分钟。

contrib.en: Introduces a Transformer-based diffusion model for generating colored point clouds conditioned on images.
contrib.zh: 引入基于Transformer的扩散模型，用于生成以图像为条件的彩色点云。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that conditioning on a grid of CLIP image latents outperforms single-embedding conditioning.
contrib.zh: 证明以CLIP图像潜在网格为条件优于单嵌入条件。

contrib.en: Shows scaling model size improves P-FID convergence and CLIP R-Precision.
contrib.zh: 展示模型规模扩展可提升P-FID收敛速度和CLIP R-Precision。

contrib.en: Releases pre-trained point cloud diffusion models and evaluation code for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 发布预训练点云扩散模型和评估代码以促进可复现性。

contrib.en: Provides a practical speed-quality trade-off for text-to-3D synthesis, enabling rapid prototyping.
contrib.zh: 为文本到3D合成提供实用的速度-质量权衡，支持快速原型设计。

limits.en: Sample quality falls short of state-of-the-art optimization-based methods like DreamFusion.
limits.zh: 样本质量不及DreamFusion等基于优化的最先进方法。

limits.en: Outputs are low-resolution point clouds (4K points), lacking fine-grained shape and texture.
limits.zh: 输出为低分辨率点云（4K点），缺乏精细形状和纹理。

limits.en: Pipeline requires synthetic renderings; cannot directly condition on real-world images.
limits.zh: 流水线需要合成渲染图，无法直接以真实图像为条件。

limits.en: Point cloud to mesh conversion can lose information, affecting rendering quality.
limits.zh: 点云到网格的转换可能丢失信息，影响渲染质量。

limits.en: Model inherits dataset biases and may generate unsafe 3D blueprints for fabrication.
limits.zh: 模型继承数据集偏差，可能生成用于制造的危险3D蓝图。

items.en: While recent work on text-conditional 3D object generation has shown promising results, the state-of-the-art methods typically require multiple GPU-hours to produce a single sample. This is in stark contrast to state-of-the-art generative image models, which produce samples in a number of seconds or minutes. In this paper, we explore an alternative method for 3D object generation which produces 3D models in only 1-2 minutes on a single GPU. Our method first generates a single synthetic view using a text-to-image diffusion model, and then produces a 3D point cloud using a second diffusion model which conditions on the generated image. While our method still falls short of the state-of-the-art in terms of sample quality, it is one to two orders of magnitude faster to sample from, offering a practical trade-off for some use cases. We release our pre-trained point cloud diffusion models, as well as evaluation code and models, at https://github.com/openai/point-e.
items.zh: 尽管近期关于文本条件3D物体生成的研究取得了令人鼓舞的成果，但最先进的方法通常需要多个GPU小时才能生成单个样本。这与最先进的生成式图像模型形成鲜明对比，后者只需数秒或数分钟即可生成样本。在本文中，我们探索了一种替代性的3D物体生成方法，该方法在单个GPU上仅需1-2分钟即可生成3D模型。我们的方法首先使用文本到图像扩散模型生成单个合成视图，然后使用第二个扩散模型基于生成的图像生成3D点云。尽管我们的方法在样本质量上仍不及最先进水平，但其采样速度快一到两个数量级，为某些用例提供了实用的权衡。我们在https://github.com/openai/point-e 发布了预训练的点云扩散模型以及评估代码和模型。

items.capEn: Figure 1: A high-level overview of our pipeline. First, a text prompt is fed into a GLIDE model to produce a synthetic rendered view. Next, a point cloud diffusion stack conditions on this image to produce a 3D RGB point cloud.
items.capZh: 图1：我们流程的高级概览。首先，将文本提示输入GLIDE模型以生成合成渲染视图。接着，点云扩散堆栈基于该图像生成3D RGB点云。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Selected point clouds generated by Point⋅⋅\cdotE using the given text prompts. For each prompt, we selected one point cloud out of eight samples.
items.capZh: 图2：Point·E根据给定文本提示生成的选定点云。对于每个提示，我们从八个样本中选取了一个点云。

items.en: With the recent explosion of text-to-image generative models, it is now possible to generate and modify high-quality images from natural language descriptions in a number of seconds (Ramesh et al., 2021; Ding et al., 2021; Nichol et al., 2021; Ramesh et al., 2022; Gafni et al., 2022; Yu et al., 2022; Saharia et al., 2022; Feng et al., 2022; Balaji et al., 2022). Inspired by these results, recent works have explored text-conditional generation in other modalities, such as video (Hong et al., 2022; Singer et al., 2022; Ho et al., 2022b, a) and 3D objects (Jain et al., 2021; Poole et al., 2022; Lin et al., 2022a; Sanghi et al., 2021, 2022). In this work, we focus specifically on the problem of text-to-3D generation, which has significant potential to democratize 3D content creation for a wide range of applications such as virtual reality, gaming, and industrial design.
items.zh: 随着文本到图像生成模型的近期爆发，现在可以在数秒内从自然语言描述生成和修改高质量图像（Ramesh等人，2021；Ding等人，2021；Nichol等人，2021；Ramesh等人，2022；Gafni等人，2022；Yu等人，2022；Saharia等人，2022；Feng等人，2022；Balaji等人，2022）。受这些结果的启发，近期工作探索了其他模态中的文本条件生成，例如视频（Hong等人，2022；Singer等人，2022；Ho等人，2022b, a）和3D物体（Jain等人，2021；Poole等人，2022；Lin等人，2022a；Sanghi等人，2021，2022）。在本工作中，我们特别关注文本到3D生成问题，该问题具有显著潜力，可推动3D内容创作在虚拟现实、游戏和工业设计等广泛应用中的普及。

items.en: Recent methods for text-to-3D synthesis typically fall into one of two categories:
items.zh: 近期文本到3D合成的方法通常分为两类：

items.en: Methods which train generative models directly on paired (text, 3D) data (Chen et al., 2018; Mittal et al., 2022; Fu et al., 2022; Zeng et al., 2022) or unlabeled 3D data (Sanghi et al., 2021, 2022; Watson et al., 2022). While these methods can leverage existing generative modeling approaches to produce samples efficiently, they are difficult to scale to diverse and complex text prompts due to the lack of large-scale 3D datasets (Sanghi et al., 2022).
items.zh: 直接在配对（文本，3D）数据（Chen等人，2018；Mittal等人，2022；Fu等人，2022；Zeng等人，2022）或未标注的3D数据（Sanghi等人，2021，2022；Watson等人，2022）上训练生成模型的方法。虽然这些方法可以利用现有生成建模方法高效生成样本，但由于缺乏大规模3D数据集（Sanghi等人，2022），它们难以扩展到多样且复杂的文本提示。

items.en: Methods which leverage pre-trained text-image models to optimize differentiable 3D representations (Jain et al., 2021; Poole et al., 2022; Lin et al., 2022a). These methods are often able to handle complex and diverse text prompts, but require expensive optimization processes to produce each sample. Furthermore, due to the lack of a strong 3D prior, these methods can fall into local minima which don’t correspond to meaningful or coherent 3D objects (Poole et al., 2022).
items.zh: 利用预训练文本-图像模型优化可微分3D表示的方法（Jain等人，2021；Poole等人，2022；Lin等人，2022a）。这些方法通常能够处理复杂多样的文本提示，但需要昂贵的优化过程来生成每个样本。此外，由于缺乏强大的3D先验，这些方法可能陷入局部最小值，无法生成有意义或连贯的3D物体（Poole等人，2022）。

items.en: We aim to combine the benefits of both categories by pairing a text-to-image model with an image-to-3D model. Our text-to-image model leverages a large corpus of (text, image) pairs, allowing it to follow diverse and complex prompts, while our image-to-3D model is trained on a smaller dataset of (image, 3D) pairs. To produce a 3D object from a text prompt, we first sample an image using the text-to-image model, and then sample a 3D object conditioned on the sampled image. Both of these steps can be performed in a number of seconds, and do not require expensive optimization procedures. Figure 1 depicts this two-stage generation process.
items.zh: 我们旨在通过将文本到图像模型与图像到3D模型配对，结合两类方法的优点。我们的文本到图像模型利用大规模（文本，图像）对语料库，能够遵循多样且复杂的提示；而我们的图像到3D模型则在较小的（图像，3D）对数据集上训练。为了从文本提示生成3D物体，我们首先使用文本到图像模型采样图像，然后基于采样图像采样3D物体。这两个步骤都可以在数秒内完成，无需昂贵的优化过程。图1描绘了这一两阶段生成过程。

items.en: We base our generative stack on diffusion (Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2015; Song & Ermon, 2020b; Ho et al., 2020), a recently proposed generative framework which has become a popular choice for text-conditional image generation. For our text-to-image model, we use a version of GLIDE (Nichol et al., 2021) fine-tuned on 3D renderings (Section 4.2). For our image-to-3D model, we use a stack of diffusion models which generate RGB point clouds conditioned on images (Section 4.3 and 4.4 detail our novel Transformer-based architecture for this task). For rendering-based evaluations, we go one step further and produce meshes from generated point clouds using a regression-based approach (Section 4.5).
items.zh: 我们的生成堆栈基于扩散模型（Sohl-Dickstein等人，2015；Song & Ermon, 2020b；Ho等人，2020），这是一种近期提出的生成框架，已成为文本条件图像生成的热门选择。对于文本到图像模型，我们使用在3D渲染上微调的GLIDE版本（Nichol等人，2021）（第4.2节）。对于图像到3D模型，我们使用一个扩散模型堆栈，该堆栈基于图像生成RGB点云（第4.3和4.4节详细介绍了我们为此任务提出的新型基于Transformer的架构）。对于基于渲染的评估，我们更进一步，使用基于回归的方法从生成的点云生成网格（第4.5节）。

items.en: We find that our system can often produce colored 3D point clouds that match both simple and complex text prompts (See Figure 2). We refer to our system as Point⋅⋅\cdotE, since it generates point clouds efficiently. We release our point cloud diffusion models, as well as evaluation code and models, at https://github.com/openai/point-e.
items.zh: 我们发现，我们的系统通常能够生成与简单和复杂文本提示匹配的彩色3D点云（见图2）。我们将我们的系统称为Point·E，因为它高效地生成点云。我们在https://github.com/openai/point-e 发布了点云扩散模型以及评估代码和模型。

items.en: Our method builds off of a growing body of work on diffusion-based models, which were first proposed by Sohl-Dickstein et al. (2015) and popularized more recently (Song & Ermon, 2020b, a; Ho et al., 2020).
items.zh: 我们的方法建立在日益增长的基于扩散模型的研究基础上，这些模型最初由Sohl-Dickstein等人（2015）提出，并在近期得到普及（Song & Ermon, 2020b, a；Ho等人，2020）。

items.en: We follow the Gaussian diffusion setup of Ho et al. (2020), which we briefly describe here. We aim to sample from some distribution q​(x0)𝑞subscript𝑥0q(x_{0}) using a neural network approximation pθ​(x0)subscript𝑝𝜃subscript𝑥0p_{\theta}(x_{0}). Under Gaussian diffusion, we define a noising process
items.zh: 我们遵循Ho等人（2020）的高斯扩散设置，在此简要描述。我们旨在使用神经网络近似pθ(x0)从分布q(x0)中采样。在高斯扩散下，我们定义一个加噪过程

items.en: for integer timesteps t∈[0,T]𝑡0𝑇t\in[0,T]. Intuitively, this process gradually adds Gaussian noise to a signal, with the amount of noise added at each timestep determined by some noise schedule βtsubscript𝛽𝑡\beta_{t}. We employ a noise schedule such that, by the final timestep t=T𝑡𝑇t=T, the sample xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} contains almost no information (i.e. it looks like Gaussian noise). Ho et al. (2020) note that it is possible to directly jump to a given timestep of the noising process without running the whole chain:
items.zh: 对于整数时间步t∈[0,T]。直观上，该过程逐渐向信号添加高斯噪声，每个时间步添加的噪声量由某个噪声调度βt决定。我们采用的噪声调度使得在最终时间步t=T时，样本xT几乎不包含信息（即看起来像高斯噪声）。Ho等人（2020）指出，可以直接跳到加噪过程的给定时间步，而无需运行整个链：

items.en: where ϵ∼𝒩​(0,𝐈)similar-toitalic-ϵ𝒩0𝐈\epsilon\sim\mathcal{N}(0,\mathbf{I}) and α¯t≔∏s=0t1−βt≔subscript¯𝛼𝑡superscriptsubscriptproduct𝑠0𝑡1subscript𝛽𝑡\bar{\alpha}_{t}\coloneqq\prod_{s=0}^{t}1-\beta_{t}.

To train a diffusion model, we approximate q​(xt−1|xt)𝑞conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝑥𝑡q(x_{t-1}|x_{t}) as a neural network pθ​(xt−1|xt)subscript𝑝𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝑥𝑡p_{\theta}(x_{t-1}|x_{t}). We can then produce a sample by starting at random Gaussian noise xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} and gradually reversing the noising process until arriving at a noiseless sample x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}. With enough small steps, pθ​(xt−1|xt)subscript𝑝𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝑥𝑡p_{\theta}(x_{t-1}|x_{t}) can be parameterized as a diagonal Gaussian distribution, and Ho et al. (2020) propose to parameterize the mean of this distribution by predicting ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, the effective noise added to a sample xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}. While Ho et al. (2020) fix the variance ΣΣ\Sigma of pθ​(xt−1|xt)subscript𝑝𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝑥𝑡p_{\theta}(x_{t-1}|x_{t}) to a reasonable per-timestep heuristic, Nichol & Dhariwal (2021) achieve better results by predicting the variance as well as the mean.
items.zh: 为了训练扩散模型，我们将q(xt-1|xt)近似为神经网络pθ(xt-1|xt)。然后，我们可以从随机高斯噪声xT开始，逐步逆转加噪过程，直到到达无噪声样本x0，从而生成样本。在足够小的步长下，pθ(xt-1|xt)可以参数化为对角高斯分布，Ho等人（2020）提出通过预测ϵ（添加到样本xt的有效噪声）来参数化该分布的均值。虽然Ho等人（2020）将pθ(xt-1|xt)的方差Σ固定为合理的每时间步启发式值，但Nichol & Dhariwal（2021）通过同时预测方差和均值取得了更好的结果。

items.en: Diffusion sampling can be cast through the lens of differential equations (Song et al., 2020), allowing one to use various SDE and ODE solvers to sample from these models. Karras et al. (2022) find that a carefully-designed second-order ODE solver provides a good trade-off between quality and sampling efficiency, and we employ this sampler for our point cloud diffusion models.
items.zh: 扩散采样可以通过微分方程的视角来理解（Song等人，2020），从而允许使用各种SDE和ODE求解器从这些模型中采样。Karras等人（2022）发现，精心设计的二阶ODE求解器在质量和采样效率之间提供了良好的权衡，我们在点云扩散模型中采用了该采样器。

items.en: To trade off sample diversity for fidelity in diffusion models, several guidance strategies may be used. Dhariwal & Nichol (2021) introduce classifier guidance, where gradients from a noise-aware classifier ∇xtpθ​(y|xt)subscript∇subscript𝑥𝑡subscript𝑝𝜃conditional𝑦subscript𝑥𝑡\nabla_{x_{t}}p_{\theta}(y|x_{t}) are used to perturb every sampling step. They find that increasing the scale of the perturbation increases generation fidelity while reducing sample diversity. Ho & Salimans (2021) introduce classifier-free guidance, wherein a conditional diffusion model p​(xt−1|xt,y)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝑥𝑡𝑦p(x_{t-1}|x_{t},y) is trained with the class label stochastically dropped and replaced with an additional ∅\varnothing class. During sampling, the model’s output ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon is linearly extrapolated away from the unconditional prediction towards the conditional prediction:
items.zh: 为了在扩散模型中权衡样本多样性与保真度，可以使用多种引导策略。Dhariwal & Nichol（2021）引入了分类器引导，其中来自噪声感知分类器∇_{xt} pθ(y|xt)的梯度用于扰动每个采样步骤。他们发现，增加扰动尺度会提高生成保真度，同时降低样本多样性。Ho & Salimans（2021）引入了无分类器引导，其中条件扩散模型p(xt-1|xt,y)在训练时随机丢弃类别标签并替换为额外的∅类。在采样过程中，模型的输出ϵ从无条件预测线性外推至条件预测：

items.en: for some guidance scale s≥1𝑠1s\geq 1. This approach is straightforward to implement, requiring only that conditioning information is randomly dropped during training time. We employ this technique throughout our models, using the drop probability 0.1.
items.zh: 对于某个引导尺度s≥1。这种方法易于实现，只需在训练时随机丢弃条件信息。我们在所有模型中使用该技术，丢弃概率为0.1。

items.en: Several prior works have explored generative models over point clouds. Achlioptas et al. (2017) train point cloud auto-encoders, and fit generative priors (either GANs (Goodfellow et al., 2014) or GMMs) on the resulting latent representations. Mo et al. (2019) generate point clouds using a VAE (Kingma & Welling, 2013) on hierarchical graph representations of 3D objects. Yang et al. (2019) train a two-stage flow model for point cloud generation: first, a prior flow model produces a latent vector, and then a second flow model samples points conditioned on the latent vector. Along the same lines, Luo & Hu (2021); Cai et al. (2020) both train two-stage models where the second stage is a diffusion model over individual points in a point cloud, and the first stage is a latent flow model or a latent GAN, respectively. Zeng et al. (2022) train a two-stage hierarchical VAE on point clouds with diffusion priors at both stages. Most similar to our work, Zhou et al. (2021a) introduce PVD, a single diffusion model that generates point clouds directly. Compared to previous point cloud diffusion methods such as PVD, our Transformer-based model architecture is simpler and incorporates less 3D-specific structure. Unlike prior works, our models also produce RGB channels alongside point cloud coordinates.
items.zh: 已有若干先前工作探索了点云上的生成模型。Achlioptas等人（2017）训练了点云自编码器，并在得到的潜在表示上拟合生成先验（GAN（Goodfellow等人，2014）或GMM）。Mo等人（2019）使用VAE（Kingma & Welling, 2013）在3D物体的层次图表示上生成点云。Yang等人（2019）训练了一个两阶段流模型用于点云生成：首先，先验流模型生成潜在向量，然后第二个流模型基于潜在向量采样点。类似地，Luo & Hu（2021）；Cai等人（2020）都训练了两阶段模型，其中第二阶段是点云中单个点上的扩散模型，第一阶段分别是潜在流模型或潜在GAN。Zeng等人（2022）在点云上训练了一个两阶段层次VAE，两个阶段都使用扩散先验。与我们的工作最相似的是，Zhou等人（2021a）引入了PVD，一个直接生成点云的单扩散模型。与PVD等先前的点云扩散方法相比，我们基于Transformer的模型架构更简单，且包含更少的3D特定结构。与先前工作不同，我们的模型还生成RGB通道以及点云坐标。

items.en: A growing body of work explores the problem of 3D model generation in representations other than point clouds. Several works aim to train 3D-aware GANs from datasets of 2D images (Chan et al., 2020; Schwarz et al., 2020; Chan et al., 2021; Or-El et al., 2021; Gu et al., 2021; Zhou et al., 2021b). These GANs are typically applied to the problem of novel view synthesis in forward-facing scenes, and do not attempt to reconstruct full 360-degree views of objects. More recently, Gao et al. (2022) train a GAN that directly produces full 3D meshes, paired with a discriminator that inputs differentiably-rendered (Laine et al., 2020) views of the generated meshes. Bautista et al. (2022) generates complete 3D scenes by first learning a representation space that decodes into NeRFs (Mildenhall et al., 2020), and then training a diffusion prior on this representation space. However, none of these works have demonstrated the ability to generate arbitrary 3D models conditioned on open-ended, complex text-prompts.
items.zh: 越来越多的研究探索了点云之外其他表示中的3D模型生成问题。若干工作旨在从2D图像数据集训练3D感知GAN（Chan等人，2020；Schwarz等人，2020；Chan等人，2021；Or-El等人，2021；Gu等人，2021；Zhou等人，2021b）。这些GAN通常应用于前向场景的新视图合成问题，并不尝试重建物体的完整360度视图。最近，Gao等人（2022）训练了一个直接生成完整3D网格的GAN，并配有一个判别器，该判别器输入生成网格的可微分渲染（Laine等人，2020）视图。Bautista等人（2022）通过首先学习一个解码为NeRF（Mildenhall等人，2020）的表示空间，然后在该表示空间上训练扩散先验，生成完整的3D场景。然而，这些工作均未展示出基于开放、复杂文本提示生成任意3D模型的能力。

items.en: Several recent works have explored the problem of text-conditional 3D generation by optimizing 3D representations according to a text-image matching objective. Jain et al. (2021) introduce DreamFields, a method which optimizes the parameters of a NeRF using an objective based on CLIP (Radford et al., 2021). Notably, this method requires no 3D training data. Building on this principle, Khalid et al. (2022) optimizes a mesh using a CLIP-guided objective, finding that the mesh representation is more efficient to optimize than a NeRF. More recently, Poole et al. (2022) extend DreamFields to leverage a pre-trained text-to-image diffusion model instead of CLIP, producing more coherent and complex objects. Lin et al. (2022a) build off of this technique, but convert the NeRF representation into a mesh and then refine the mesh representation in a second optimization stage. While these approaches are able to produce diverse and complex objects or scenes, the optimization procedures typically require multiple GPU hours to converge, making them difficult to apply in practical settings.
items.zh: 最近的一些工作探索了通过根据文本-图像匹配目标优化3D表示来进行文本条件3D生成的问题。Jain等人(2021)引入了DreamFields，该方法使用基于CLIP(Radford等人,2021)的目标优化NeRF的参数。值得注意的是，该方法不需要3D训练数据。基于这一原理，Khalid等人(2022)使用CLIP引导的目标优化网格，发现网格表示比NeRF更易于优化。最近，Poole等人(2022)扩展了DreamFields，利用预训练的文本到图像扩散模型代替CLIP，生成了更连贯和复杂的物体。Lin等人(2022a)在此基础上进行了改进，但将NeRF表示转换为网格，然后在第二阶段优化中细化网格表示。虽然这些方法能够生成多样且复杂的物体或场景，但优化过程通常需要多个GPU小时才能收敛，这使得它们难以在实际环境中应用。

items.en: While the above approaches are all based on optimization against a text-image model and do not leverage 3D data, other methods for text-conditional 3D synthesis make use of 3D data, possibly paired with text labels. Chen et al. (2018) employ a dataset of text-3D pairs to train a GAN to generate 3D representations conditioned on text. Liu et al. (2022) also leverage paired text-3D data to generate models in a joint representation space. Sanghi et al. (2021) employ a flow-based model to generate 3D latent representations, and find some text-to-3D capabilities when conditioning their model on CLIP embeddings. More recently, Zeng et al. (2022) achieve similar results when conditioning on CLIP embeddings, but employ a hierarchical VAE on point clouds for their generative stack. Mittal et al. (2022) and Fu et al. (2022) employ a VQ-VAE (van den Oord et al., 2017) with an autoregressive prior to sample 3D shapes conditioned on text labels. More recently, Sanghi et al. (2022) also employ a VQ-VAE approach, but leverage CLIP embeddings to avoid the need for explicit text labels in the dataset. While many of these works demonstrate promising early results, they tend to be limited to simple prompts or a narrow set of object categories due to the limited availability of 3D training data. Our method sidesteps this issue by leveraging a pre-trained text-to-image model to condition our 3D generation procedure.
items.zh: 虽然上述方法都基于针对文本-图像模型的优化，并且不利用3D数据，但其他文本条件3D合成方法使用了3D数据，可能还配有文本标签。Chen等人(2018)使用文本-3D对数据集训练GAN，以生成以文本为条件的3D表示。Liu等人(2022)也利用配对的文本-3D数据在联合表示空间中生成模型。Sanghi等人(2021)使用基于流的模型生成3D潜在表示，并在以CLIP嵌入为条件时发现了一些文本到3D的能力。最近，Zeng等人(2022)在以CLIP嵌入为条件时取得了类似的结果，但在其生成堆栈中对点云使用了分层VAE。Mittal等人(2022)和Fu等人(2022)使用VQ-VAE(van den Oord等人,2017)和自回归先验来采样以文本标签为条件的3D形状。最近，Sanghi等人(2022)也采用了VQ-VAE方法，但利用CLIP嵌入避免了数据集中显式文本标签的需求。虽然这些工作中有许多展示了有希望的早期结果，但由于3D训练数据的有限可用性，它们往往局限于简单的提示或狭窄的物体类别。我们的方法通过利用预训练的文本到图像模型来条件化我们的3D生成过程，从而绕过了这个问题。

items.en: A large body of research focuses on reconstructing 3D models from single or few images. Notably, this is an underspecified problem, since the model must impute some details not present in the conditioning image(s). Nevertheless, some regression-based methods have shown promising results on this task (Choy et al., 2016; Wang et al., 2018; Gkioxari et al., 2019; Groueix et al., 2018; Yu et al., 2020; Lin et al., 2022b). A separate body of literature studies generative approaches for single- or multi-view reconstruction. Fan et al. (2016) predict point clouds of objects from single views using a VAE. Sun et al. (2018) use a hybrid of a flow predictor and a GAN to generate novel views from few images. Kosiorek et al. (2021) use a view-conditional VAE to generate latent vectors for a NeRF decoder. Watson et al. (2022) employ an image-to-image diffusion model to synthesize novel views of an object conditioned on a single view, allowing many consistent views to be synthesized autoregressively.
items.zh: 大量研究集中于从单张或少量图像重建3D模型。值得注意的是，这是一个欠定问题，因为模型必须推断条件图像中不存在的一些细节。尽管如此，一些基于回归的方法在此任务上显示了有希望的结果(Choy等人,2016; Wang等人,2018; Gkioxari等人,2019; Groueix等人,2018; Yu等人,2020; Lin等人,2022b)。另一部分文献研究了单视图或多视图重建的生成方法。Fan等人(2016)使用VAE从单视图预测物体的点云。Sun等人(2018)使用流预测器和GAN的混合从少量图像生成新视图。Kosiorek等人(2021)使用视图条件VAE为NeRF解码器生成潜在向量。Watson等人(2022)使用图像到图像扩散模型合成以单视图为条件的物体新视图，从而可以自回归地合成多个一致的视图。

items.en: Rather than training a single generative model to directly produce point clouds conditioned on text, we instead break the generation process into three steps. First, we generate a synthetic view conditioned on a text caption. Next, we produce a coarse point cloud (1,024 points) conditioned on the synthetic view. And finally, we produce a fine point cloud (4,096 points) conditioned on the low-resolution point cloud and the synthetic view. In practice, we assume that the image contains the relevant information from the text, and do not explicitly condition the point clouds on the text.
items.zh: 我们不是训练一个单一的生成模型直接生成以文本为条件的点云，而是将生成过程分解为三个步骤。首先，我们根据文本描述生成一个合成视图。接下来，我们根据合成视图生成一个粗点云（1024个点）。最后，我们根据低分辨率点云和合成视图生成一个精细点云（4096个点）。在实践中，我们假设图像包含文本中的相关信息，并且不显式地以文本为条件生成点云。

items.en: To generate text-conditional synthetic views, we use a 3-billion parameter GLIDE model (Nichol et al., 2021) fine-tuned on rendered 3D models from our dataset (Section 4.2). To generate low-resolution point clouds, we use a conditional, permutation invariant diffusion model (Section 4.3). To upsample these low-resolution point clouds, we use a similar (but smaller) diffusion model which is additionally conditioned on the low-resolution point cloud (Section 4.4).
items.zh: 为了生成文本条件的合成视图，我们使用一个30亿参数的GLIDE模型(Nichol等人,2021)，该模型在我们的数据集中的渲染3D模型上进行了微调（第4.2节）。为了生成低分辨率点云，我们使用一个条件、排列不变的扩散模型（第4.3节）。为了上采样这些低分辨率点云，我们使用一个类似的（但更小的）扩散模型，该模型额外以低分辨率点云为条件（第4.4节）。

items.en: We train our models on a dataset of several million 3D models and associated metadata. We process the dataset into rendered views, text descriptions, and 3D point clouds with associated RGB colors for each point. We describe our data processing pipeline in more detail in Section 4.1.
items.zh: 我们在一个包含数百万个3D模型及相关元数据的数据集上训练我们的模型。我们将数据集处理为渲染视图、文本描述以及每个点带有RGB颜色的3D点云。我们在第4.1节中更详细地描述我们的数据处理流程。

items.en: We train our models on several million 3D models. We found that data formats and quality varied wildly across our dataset, prompting us to develop various post-processing steps to ensure higher data quality.
items.zh: 我们在数百万个3D模型上训练我们的模型。我们发现数据格式和质量在我们的数据集中差异很大，这促使我们开发各种后处理步骤以确保更高的数据质量。

items.en: To convert all of our data into one generic format, we rendered every 3D model from 20 random camera angles as RGBAD images using Blender (Community, 2018), which supports a variety of 3D formats and comes with an optimized rendering engine. For each model, our Blender script normalizes the model to a bounding cube, configures a standard lighting setup, and finally exports RGBAD images using Blender’s built-in realtime rendering engine.
items.zh: 为了将所有数据转换为一种通用格式，我们使用Blender(Community, 2018)从20个随机相机角度将每个3D模型渲染为RGBAD图像，Blender支持多种3D格式并带有优化的渲染引擎。对于每个模型，我们的Blender脚本将模型归一化到一个边界立方体，配置标准光照设置，最后使用Blender的内置实时渲染引擎导出RGBAD图像。

items.en: We then converted each object into a colored point cloud using its renderings. In particular, we first constructed a dense point cloud for each object by computing points for each pixel in each RGBAD image. These point clouds typically contain hundreds of thousands of unevenly spaced points, so we additionally used farthest point sampling to create uniform clouds of 4K points. By constructing point clouds directly from renders, we were able to sidestep various issues that might arise from attempting to sample points directly from 3D meshes, such as sampling points which are contained within the model or dealing with 3D models that are stored in unusual file formats.
items.zh: 然后，我们使用渲染结果将每个物体转换为彩色点云。具体来说，我们首先通过计算每个RGBAD图像中每个像素的点来为每个物体构建一个密集点云。这些点云通常包含数十万个不均匀分布的点，因此我们额外使用最远点采样来创建4K点的均匀点云。通过直接从渲染构建点云，我们能够避免尝试直接从3D网格采样点可能出现的各种问题，例如采样包含在模型内部的点或处理以不寻常文件格式存储的3D模型。

items.en: Finally, we employed various heuristics to reduce the frequency of low-quality models in our dataset. First, we eliminated flat objects by computing the SVD of each point cloud and only retaining those where the smallest singular value was above a certain threshold. Next, we clustered the dataset by CLIP features (for each object, we averaged features over all renders). We found that some clusters contained many low-quality categories of models, while other clusters appeared more diverse or interpretable. We binned these clusters into several buckets of varying quality, and used a weighted mixture of the resulting buckets as our final dataset.
items.zh: 最后，我们使用各种启发式方法来减少数据集中低质量模型的频率。首先，我们通过计算每个点云的SVD并仅保留最小奇异值高于某个阈值的点云来消除扁平物体。接下来，我们根据CLIP特征对数据集进行聚类（对于每个物体，我们平均所有渲染的特征）。我们发现一些聚类包含许多低质量类别的模型，而其他聚类看起来更多样化或可解释。我们将这些聚类分入几个不同质量级别的桶中，并使用所得桶的加权混合作为我们的最终数据集。

items.en: Our point cloud models are conditioned on rendered views from our dataset, which were all produced using the same renderer and lighting settings. Therefore, to ensure that these models correctly handle generated synthetic views, we aim to explicitly generate 3D renders that match the distribution of our dataset.
items.zh: 我们的点云模型以数据集中的渲染视图为条件，这些视图都是使用相同的渲染器和光照设置生成的。因此，为了确保这些模型正确处理生成的合成视图，我们旨在显式生成与数据集分布匹配的3D渲染。

items.en: To this end, we fine-tune GLIDE with a mixture of its original dataset and our dataset of 3D renderings. Since our 3D dataset is small compared to the original GLIDE training set, we only sample images from the 3D dataset 5% of the time, using the original dataset for the remaining 95%. We fine-tune for 100K iterations, meaning that the model has made several epochs over the 3D dataset (but has never seen the same exact rendered viewpoint twice).
items.zh: 为此，我们使用原始数据集和3D渲染数据集的混合来微调GLIDE。由于我们的3D数据集与原始GLIDE训练集相比很小，我们仅5%的时间从3D数据集采样图像，其余95%使用原始数据集。我们微调了10万次迭代，这意味着模型在3D数据集上已经进行了多个周期（但从未两次看到完全相同的渲染视角）。

items.en: To ensure that we always sample in-distribution renders (rather than only sampling them 5% of the time), we add a special token to every 3D render’s text prompt indicating that it is a 3D render; we then sample with this token at test time.
items.zh: 为了确保我们始终采样分布内的渲染（而不是仅5%的时间采样它们），我们向每个3D渲染的文本提示添加一个特殊标记，指示它是3D渲染；然后在测试时使用该标记进行采样。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Our point cloud diffusion model architecture. Images are fed through a frozen, pre-trained CLIP model, and the output grid is fed as tokens into the transformer. Both the timestep t𝑡t and noised input xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} are also fed in as tokens. The output tokens corresponding to xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} are used to predict ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon and ΣΣ\Sigma.
items.capZh: 图3：我们的点云扩散模型架构。图像通过冻结的预训练CLIP模型，输出网格作为标记输入Transformer。时间步t和噪声输入xt也作为标记输入。对应于xt的输出标记用于预测ϵ和Σ。

items.en: To generate point clouds with diffusion, we extend the framework used by Zhou et al. (2021a) to include RGB colors for each point in a point cloud. In particular, we represent a point cloud as a tensor of shape K×6𝐾6K\times 6, where K𝐾K is the number of points, and the inner dimension contains (x,y,z)𝑥𝑦𝑧(x,y,z) coordinates as well as (R,G,B)𝑅𝐺𝐵(R,G,B) colors. All coordinates and colors are normalized to the range [−1,1]11[-1,1]. We then generate these tensors directly with diffusion, starting from random noise of shape K×6𝐾6K\times 6, and gradually denoising it.
items.zh: 为了使用扩散生成点云，我们扩展了Zhou等人(2021a)使用的框架，以包括点云中每个点的RGB颜色。具体来说，我们将点云表示为形状为K×6的张量，其中K是点的数量，内部维度包含(x,y,z)坐标以及(R,G,B)颜色。所有坐标和颜色归一化到[-1,1]范围。然后我们直接使用扩散生成这些张量，从形状为K×6的随机噪声开始，并逐渐去噪。

items.en: Unlike prior work which leverages 3D-specific architectures to process point clouds, we use a simple Transformer-based model (Vaswani et al., 2017) to predict both ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon and ΣΣ\Sigma conditioned on the image, timestep t𝑡t, and noised point cloud xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}. An overview of our architecture can be seen in Figure 3. As input context to this model, we run each point in the point cloud through a linear layer with output dimension D𝐷D, obtaining a K×D𝐾𝐷K\times D input tensor. Additionally, we run the timestep t𝑡t through a small MLP, obtaining another D𝐷D-dimensional vector to prepend to the context.
items.zh: 与利用3D特定架构处理点云的先前工作不同，我们使用一个简单的基于Transformer的模型(Vaswani等人,2017)来预测以图像、时间步t和噪声点云xt为条件的ϵ和Σ。我们架构的概述如图3所示。作为该模型的输入上下文，我们将点云中的每个点通过一个输出维度为D的线性层，得到一个K×D的输入张量。此外，我们将时间步t通过一个小型MLP，得到另一个D维向量，将其前置到上下文中。

items.en: To condition on the image, we feed it through a pre-trained ViT-L/14 CLIP model, take the last layer embeddings from this CLIP model (of shape 256×D′256superscript𝐷′256\times D^{\prime}), and linearly project it into another tensor of shape 256×D256𝐷256\times D before prepending it to the Transformer context. In Section 5.1, we find that this is superior to using a single CLIP image or text embedding, as done by Sanghi et al. (2021); Zeng et al. (2022); Sanghi et al. (2022).
items.zh: 为了以图像为条件，我们将其通过预训练的ViT-L/14 CLIP模型，从该CLIP模型中获取最后一层嵌入（形状为256×D'），并将其线性投影为另一个形状为256×D的张量，然后前置到Transformer上下文中。在第5.1节中，我们发现这优于使用单个CLIP图像或文本嵌入，如Sanghi等人(2021); Zeng等人(2022); Sanghi等人(2022)所做的那样。

items.en: The final input context to our model is of shape (K+257)×D𝐾257𝐷(K+257)\times D. To obtain a final output sequence of length K𝐾K, we take the final K𝐾K tokens of output and project it to obtain ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon and ΣΣ\Sigma predictions for the K𝐾K input points.
items.zh: 我们模型的最终输入上下文形状为(K+257)×D。为了获得长度为K的最终输出序列，我们取最后K个输出标记并将其投影以获得K个输入点的ϵ和Σ预测。

items.en: Notably, we do not employ positional encodings for this model. As a result, the model itself is permutation-invariant to the input point clouds (although the output order is tied to the input order).
items.zh: 值得注意的是，我们没有为此模型使用位置编码。因此，模型本身对输入点云是排列不变的（尽管输出顺序与输入顺序相关）。

items.en: For image diffusion models, the best quality is typically achieved by using some form of hierarchy, where a low-resolution base model produces output which is then upsampled by another model (Nichol & Dhariwal, 2021; Saharia et al., 2021; Ho et al., 2021; Rombach et al., 2021). We employ this approach to point cloud generation by first generating 1K points with a large base model, and then upsampling to 4K points using a smaller upsampling model. Notably, our models’ compute requirements scale with the number of points, so it is four times more expensive to generate 4K points than 1K points for a fixed model size.
items.zh: 对于图像扩散模型，最佳质量通常通过使用某种层次结构来实现，其中低分辨率基础模型产生输出，然后由另一个模型上采样(Nichol & Dhariwal, 2021; Saharia等人, 2021; Ho等人, 2021; Rombach等人, 2021)。我们将这种方法应用于点云生成，首先使用大型基础模型生成1K个点，然后使用较小的上采样模型上采样到4K个点。值得注意的是，我们模型的计算需求随点的数量扩展，因此对于固定模型大小，生成4K个点的成本是生成1K个点的四倍。

items.en: Our upsampler uses the same architecture as our base model, with extra conditioning tokens for the low-resolution point cloud. To arrive at 4K points, the upsampler conditions on 1K points and generates an additional 3K points which are added to the low-resolution pointcloud. We pass the conditioning points through a separate linear embedding layer than the one used for xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}, allowing the model to distinguish conditioning information from new points without requiring the use of positional embeddings.
items.zh: 我们的上采样器采用与基础模型相同的架构，但额外增加了用于低分辨率点云的条件标记。为了达到4K点，上采样器以1K点为条件，生成额外的3K点，并将其添加到低分辨率点云中。我们将条件点通过一个单独的线性嵌入层传递，而不是用于x_t的嵌入层，这使得模型能够区分条件信息和新点，而无需使用位置嵌入。

items.en: For rendering-based evaluations, we do not render generated point clouds directly. Rather, we convert the point clouds into textured meshes and render these meshes using Blender. Producing meshes from point clouds is a well-studied, sometimes difficult problem. Point clouds produced by our models often have cracks, outliers, or other types of noise that make the problem particularly challenging. We briefly tried using pre-trained SAP models (Peng et al., 2021) for this purpose, but found that the resulting meshes sometimes lost large portions or important details of the shape that were present in the point clouds. Rather than training new SAP models, we opted to take a simpler approach.
items.zh: 对于基于渲染的评估，我们不直接渲染生成的点云。而是将点云转换为带纹理的网格，并使用Blender渲染这些网格。从点云生成网格是一个研究充分但有时困难的问题。我们的模型生成的点云通常存在裂缝、离群点或其他类型的噪声，这使得问题特别具有挑战性。我们曾尝试使用预训练的SAP模型（Peng等人，2021）来实现这一目的，但发现生成的网格有时会丢失点云中存在的大部分形状或重要细节。我们没有训练新的SAP模型，而是选择了一种更简单的方法。

items.en: To convert point clouds into meshes, we use a regression-based model to predict the signed distance field of an object given its point cloud, and then apply marching cubes (Lorensen & Cline, 1987) to the resulting SDF to extract a mesh. We then assign colors to each vertex of the mesh using the color of the nearest point from the original point cloud. For details, see Appendix C.
items.zh: 为了将点云转换为网格，我们使用一个基于回归的模型，根据给定点云预测物体的符号距离场，然后对得到的SDF应用移动立方体算法（Lorensen & Cline, 1987）来提取网格。接着，我们使用原始点云中最近点的颜色为网格的每个顶点分配颜色。详情见附录C。

items.en: In the following sections, we conduct a number of ablations and comparisons to evaluate how our method performs and scales. We adopt the CLIP R-Precision (Park et al., 2021) metric for evaluating text-to-3D methods end-to-end, using the same object-centric evaluation prompts as Jain et al. (2021). Additionally, we introduce a new pair of metrics which we refer to as P-IS and P-FID, which are point cloud analogs for Inception Score (Salimans et al., 2016) and FID (Heusel et al., 2017), respectively.
items.zh: 在接下来的部分中，我们进行了一系列消融实验和比较，以评估我们的方法的表现和扩展性。我们采用CLIP R-Precision（Park等人，2021）指标来端到端评估文本到3D方法，使用与Jain等人（2021）相同的以物体为中心的评估提示。此外，我们引入了一对新指标，称为P-IS和P-FID，它们分别是点云版本的Inception Score（Salimans等人，2016）和FID（Heusel等人，2017）。

items.en: To construct our P-IS and P-FID metrics, we employ a modified PointNet++ model (Qi et al., 2017) to extract features and predict class probabilities for point clouds. For details, see Appendix B.
items.zh: 为了构建P-IS和P-FID指标，我们使用修改后的PointNet++模型（Qi等人，2017）来提取特征并预测点云的类别概率。详情见附录B。

items.en: In this section, we train a variety of base diffusion models to study the effect of scaling and to ablate the importance of image conditioning. We train the following base models and evaluate them throughout training:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们训练了多种基础扩散模型，以研究缩放的效果并消融图像条件的重要性。我们训练了以下基础模型，并在整个训练过程中对其进行评估：

items.en: 40M (uncond.): a small model without any conditioning information.
items.zh: 40M（无条件）：一个没有任何条件信息的小模型。

items.en: 40M (text vec.): a small model which only conditions on text captions, not rendered images. The text caption is embedded with CLIP, and the CLIP embedding is appended as a single extra token of context. This model depends on the text captions present in our 3D dataset, and does not leverage the fine-tuned GLIDE model.
items.zh: 40M（文本向量）：一个小模型，仅以文本描述为条件，而不以渲染图像为条件。文本描述通过CLIP嵌入，并将CLIP嵌入作为单个额外的上下文标记附加。该模型依赖于我们3D数据集中存在的文本描述，并且不利用微调后的GLIDE模型。

items.en: 40M (image vec.): a small model which conditions on CLIP image embeddings of rendered images, similar to Sanghi et al. (2021). This differs from the other image-conditional models in that the image is encoded into a single token of context, rather than as a sequence of latents corresponding to the CLIP latent grid.
items.zh: 40M（图像向量）：一个小模型，以渲染图像的CLIP图像嵌入为条件，类似于Sanghi等人（2021）。这与其他图像条件模型的不同之处在于，图像被编码为单个上下文标记，而不是对应于CLIP潜在网格的潜在序列。

items.en: 40M: a small model with full image conditioning through a grid of CLIP latents.
items.zh: 40M：一个小模型，通过CLIP潜在网格实现完整的图像条件。

items.en: 300M: a medium model with full image conditioning through a grid of CLIP latents.
items.zh: 300M：一个中等模型，通过CLIP潜在网格实现完整的图像条件。

items.en: 1B: a large model with full image conditioning through a grid of CLIP latents.
items.zh: 1B：一个大模型，通过CLIP潜在网格实现完整的图像条件。

items.en: In order to isolate changes to the base model, we use the same (image conditional) upsampler model for all evaluations, and use the same 306 pre-generated synthetic views for the CLIP R-Precision evaluation prompts. Here we use the ViT-L/14 CLIP model to compute CLIP R-Precision, but we report results with an alternative CLIP model in Section 5.3.
items.zh: 为了隔离基础模型的变化，我们在所有评估中使用相同的（图像条件）上采样器模型，并对CLIP R-Precision评估提示使用相同的306个预生成合成视图。这里我们使用ViT-L/14 CLIP模型计算CLIP R-Precision，但在第5.3节中报告了使用替代CLIP模型的结果。

items.en: In Figure 4, we present the results of our ablations. We find that using only text conditioning with no text-to-image step results in much worse CLIP R-Precision (see Appendix E for more details). Furthermore, we find that using a single CLIP embedding to condition on images is worse than using a grid of embeddings, suggesting that the point cloud model benefits from seeing more (spatial) information about the conditioning image. Finally, we find that scaling our model improves the speed of P-FID convergence, and increases final CLIP R-Precision.
items.zh: 在图4中，我们展示了消融实验的结果。我们发现，仅使用文本条件而不进行文本到图像步骤会导致CLIP R-Precision差得多（更多细节见附录E）。此外，我们发现使用单个CLIP嵌入作为图像条件比使用嵌入网格更差，这表明点云模型受益于看到条件图像的更多（空间）信息。最后，我们发现缩放我们的模型提高了P-FID收敛的速度，并提高了最终的CLIP R-Precision。

items.en: We find that Point⋅⋅\cdotE can often produce consistent and high-quality 3D shapes for complex prompts. In Figure 2, we show various point cloud samples which demonstrate our model’s ability to infer a variety of shapes while correctly binding colors to the relevant parts of the shapes.
items.zh: 我们发现Point·E通常能够为复杂提示生成一致且高质量的3D形状。在图2中，我们展示了各种点云样本，这些样本展示了我们的模型推断各种形状的能力，同时正确地将颜色绑定到形状的相关部分。

items.en: Sometimes the point cloud diffusion model fails to understand or extrapolate the conditioning image, resulting in a shape that does not match the original prompt. We find that this is usually due to one of two issues: 1) the model incorrectly interprets the shape of the object depicted in the image, or 2) the model incorrectly infers some part of the shape that is occluded in the image. In Figure 5, we present an example of each of these two failure modes.
items.zh: 有时点云扩散模型无法理解或推断条件图像，导致生成的形状与原始提示不匹配。我们发现这通常是由于两个问题之一：1）模型错误地解释了图像中描绘的物体形状，或2）模型错误地推断出图像中被遮挡的形状部分。在图5中，我们展示了这两种失败模式的各一个例子。

items.capEn: (a) Image to point cloud sample for the prompt “a very realistic 3D rendering of a corgi”.
items.capZh: （a）针对提示“一个非常逼真的柯基犬3D渲染”的图像到点云样本。

items.capEn: (b) Image to point cloud sample for the prompt “a traffic cone”.
items.capZh: (b) 针对提示词“一个交通锥”的图像到点云样本。

items.en: As text-conditional 3D synthesis is a fairly new area of research, there is not yet a standard set of benchmarks for this task. However, several other works evaluate 3D generation using CLIP R-Precision, and we compare to these methods in Table 1. In addition to CLIP R-Precision, we also note the reported sampling compute requirements for each method.
items.zh: 由于文本条件3D合成是一个相当新的研究领域，目前还没有一套标准的基准测试。然而，其他几项工作使用CLIP R-Precision评估3D生成，我们在表1中与这些方法进行了比较。除了CLIP R-Precision，我们还注明了每种方法报告的采样算力需求。

items.en: While our method performs worse than the current state-of-the-art, we note two subtleties of this evaluation which may explain some (but likely not all) of this discrepancy:
items.zh: 虽然我们的方法表现不如当前最先进的技术，但我们注意到评估中的两个细微之处，这可能部分（但可能不是全部）解释这种差异：

items.en: Unlike multi-view optimization-based methods like DreamFusion, Point⋅⋅\cdotE does not explicitly optimize every view to match the text prompt. This could result in lower CLIP R-Precision simply because certain objects are not easy to identify from all angles.
items.zh: 与DreamFusion等多视图优化方法不同，Point·E没有显式优化每个视图以匹配文本提示。这可能导致CLIP R-Precision较低，仅仅是因为某些物体从所有角度都不容易识别。

items.en: Our method produces point clouds which must be preprocessed before rendering. Converting point clouds into meshes is a difficult problem, and the approach we use can sometimes lose information present in the point clouds themselves.
items.zh: 我们的方法生成的点云在渲染前需要预处理。将点云转换为网格是一个难题，我们使用的方法有时会丢失点云本身存在的信息。

items.en: While our method performs worse on this evaluation than state-of-the-art techniques, it produces samples in a small fraction of the time. This could make it more practical for certain applications, or could allow for the discovery of higher-quality 3D objects by sampling many objects and selecting the best one according to some heuristic.
items.zh: 虽然我们的方法在此评估中表现不如最先进的技术，但它能在极短的时间内生成样本。这可能使其在某些应用中更实用，或者通过采样大量对象并根据某种启发式选择最佳对象，从而发现更高质量的3D物体。

items.en: While our model is a meaningful step towards fast text-to-3D synthesis, it also has several limitations. Currently, our pipeline requires synthetic renderings, but this limitation could be lifted in the future by training 3D generators that condition on real-world images. Furthermore, while our method produces colored three-dimensional shapes, it does so at a relatively low resolution in a 3D format (point clouds) that does not capture fine-grained shape or texture. Extending this method to produce high-quality 3D representations such as meshes or NeRFs could allow the model’s outputs to be used for a variety of applications. Finally, our method could be used to initialize optimization-based techniques to speed up initial convergence.
items.zh: 尽管我们的模型是向快速文本到3D合成迈出的有意义的一步，但它也存在若干局限性。目前，我们的流程需要合成渲染，但未来可以通过训练基于真实世界图像的条件3D生成器来消除这一限制。此外，虽然我们的方法生成彩色三维形状，但它是通过3D格式（点云）以相对较低的分辨率进行的，无法捕捉精细的形状或纹理。将这种方法扩展到生成高质量的3D表示（如网格或NeRF）可以使模型的输出用于各种应用。最后，我们的方法可用于初始化基于优化的技术，以加速初始收敛。

items.en: We expect that this model shares many of the limitations, including bias, as our DALL⋅⋅\cdotE 2 system where many of the biases are inherited from the dataset (Mishkin et al., 2022). In addition, this model has the ability to support the creation of point clouds that can then be used to fabricate products in the real world, for example through 3D printing (Walther, 2014; Neely, 2016; Straub & Kerlin, 2016). This has implications both when the models are used to create blueprints for dangerous objects and when the blueprints are trusted to be safe despite no empirical validation (Figure 6).
items.zh: 我们预计该模型与我们的DALL·E 2系统共享许多局限性，包括偏见，其中许多偏见继承自数据集（Mishkin等人，2022）。此外，该模型能够支持创建点云，然后用于制造现实世界中的产品，例如通过3D打印（Walther, 2014; Neely, 2016; Straub & Kerlin, 2016）。这在模型被用于创建危险物体的蓝图，以及在没有经验验证的情况下信任蓝图是安全的情况下都有影响（图6）。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Example of a potential misuse of our model, where it could be used to fabricate objects in the real world without external validation.
items.capZh: 图6：我们模型潜在滥用的一个示例，它可能在没有外部验证的情况下用于制造现实世界中的物体。

items.en: We have presented Point⋅⋅\cdotE, a system for text-conditional synthesis of 3D point clouds that first generates synthetic views and then generates colored point clouds conditioned on these views. We find that Point⋅⋅\cdotE is capable of efficiently producing diverse and complex 3D shapes conditioned on text prompts. We hope that our approach can serve as a starting point for further work in the field of text-to-3D synthesis.
items.zh: 我们提出了Point·E，一个用于文本条件合成3D点云的系统，该系统首先生成合成视图，然后基于这些视图生成彩色点云。我们发现Point·E能够高效地生成多样且复杂的3D形状，并受文本提示条件。我们希望我们的方法能够作为文本到3D合成领域进一步工作的起点。

items.en: We would like to thank everyone behind ChatGPT for creating a tool that helped provide useful writing feedback.
items.zh: 我们要感谢ChatGPT背后的所有人，他们创建了一个工具，为提供有用的写作反馈提供了帮助。
